selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer position is 03 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD, M.Tech, MBA, or a Master's Degree in Engineering, Science, Technology, Management, Public Policy, or a related discipline to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Executive Officer role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Project Executive Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Senior Project Executive Officer post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur).

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/116.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxation benefits mentioned?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly provided in the extracted data. It is advisable to check the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
